Overrides.Override: 5% increased Effect of Herald Buffs on you
5% increased Effect of Herald Buffs on you
Fire at most 1 Projectile Projectiles Fork Projectiles Chain an additional time Limited to 1 Runegraft of Refraction
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
